name: Manali
feel: Crisp mountain air, towering peaks, pine forests, buzzing cafes

feel: Rushing river sounds, dense pine woods, reggae music, wandering trails

feel: Steep forest climbs, natural hot sulfur baths, misty mountain tops

name: Spiti Valley
feel: Barren landscapes, ancient Buddhist chants, starry nights, extreme altitude

name: Kedarnath
mood: Reverent, physically demanding, deeply spiritual, peaceful
feel: Freezing winds, echoing temple bells, shared devotion, towering snow peaks

feel: Holy river rituals, colorful temple facade, vibrant pilgrim energy, high mountain silence

feel: Rolling green meadows, snow-capped panoramas, starry camping nights, crisp frost

name: Auli
feel: Powder snow, thrilling ski slopes, pine-scented breeze, luxurious winter comfort

name: Nainital
feel: Placid green lake, bustling mall road, colonial architecture, misty evenings

name: Mussoorie
feel: Cloud-covered hills, cascading waterfalls, heritage bakeries, winding mountain roads

name: Kerala Backwaters
feel: Floating on calm waters, swaying palm trees, tropical humidity, fresh coastal food

feel: Endless green tea carpets, cool mist on the face, aroma of fresh tea, winding ghat roads

name: Wayanad
feel: Dense tropical jungles, hidden waterfalls, spice plantation aromas, elephant sightings

name: Coorg
feel: Smell of blooming coffee, misty mornings, grand waterfalls, warm Kodava hospitality

name: Ooty

feel: Star-shaped lake, dense pine forests, sudden mist rolls, homemade chocolate aroma

name: Gokarna
feel: Crashing ocean waves, cliffside beach treks, temple chants, sandy toes

feel: Yellow colonial walls, French bakeries, spiritual ashram quiet, seaside promenades

name: Meghalaya (Root Bridges)

name: Shillong
feel: Rock music culture, rolling pine hills, clean streets, bustling local cafes

feel: Plunging cliffs, endless waterfalls, dark limestone caves, constant mist

name: Tawang

feel: Endless rice paddies, indigenous Apatani culture, acoustic music vibes, bamboo huts

feel: Satra monastery performances, cycling dirt paths, massive river currents, bamboo stilt houses

name: Jaipur
feel: Massive stone forts, vibrant bazaars, intricate palace windows, royal history

name: Udaipur

name: Jaisalmer

name: Jodhpur

name: Pushkar

name: Bikaner
feel: Red sandstone palaces, famous savory snacks, rat temple mystery, deep desert vibes

name: Ranthambore
feel: Open jeep safaris, spotting wild tigers, ancient fort in jungle, dry deciduous forest

name: Bundi
